sentences.text: Hello, and thank you for calling H J Russell and Company when we deliver exceptional results as well as productive and efficient solutions specializing and development construction program management and property management to better serve you please select from one of the following menu options construction press one program management Presley know name in the directory matches the keys you entered please reenter the name using seven for Q and nine for Z no, no name press one for Jennifer Allan to cancel and return please hold while I transfer your call.
